projects.intro: Welcome to AgentFlow! This is a visual workflow orchestration tool for building and running AI Agent task flows. Let's quickly explore the core features.
projects.create: Click here to create your first pipeline. AgentFlow uses visual flow graphs to orchestrate AI agent tasks.
projects.search: Search existing pipelines by name, description, or path.
projects.cards: Pipeline cards show name, description, and source location. Click a card to open the editor.
projects.activity: The right panel shows recently opened and executed pipelines for quick access.

flow.palette: Left panel provides node types: Agent (AI execution), Tool (utilities), Control (flow logic), Provide (data input).
flow.agentNodes: Agent nodes: AI subtasks executed by Cursor/OpenCode, supporting requirement analysis, code implementation, testing, etc.
flow.toolNodes: Tool nodes: Execute shell commands, load/save data, print output, and other utility operations.
flow.controlNodes: Control nodes: Control flow direction, including start/end, conditional branches, merge points.
flow.emptyHint: When canvas is empty, drag nodes onto it, or use the Composer below to describe requirements and let AI generate the flow.
flow.composer: Describe your requirements in natural language here, and AI will generate a complete flow graph for you.
flow.toolbar: Top toolbar: Run the flow, view execution history, edit settings, view keyboard shortcuts help.
